title: Rainberg Step Stool for Kids, Sturdy Double Step Stool for Toddlers, Anti-Slip Stool, Toddler's Stool for Potty Training and Use in the Kitchen and Bathroom Easy to Clean and Portable (Grey, 1)
features: ✅ Lightweight Sturdy Design for added durability and protection.
✅ Non Slip Toddler Foot Step for added aid and usability.
✅ Easy to store and stackabkle design makes it perfect for every day use.
✅ To be used both in Kirtchen or Bathroom , Suitable for Adults and Kids
✅ Made of sturdy reinforced plastic with grip pads on the base for non slip traction.
description: Product Description About Rainberg We are a UK-based company, We pride ourselves on manufacturing top quality, durable and cost-effective items to ensure safety, health, and comfort for every young family. Our products are designed to not only help make your home safer but also to make your life easier. At the same time, We are always ready to take feedback on the products. Rainberg manufacturers will try and update the products according to the needs of customers. Rainberg Step Stool A Best Choice for Kid's Independent Journey Steady & Sturdy Rainberg Step Stool gives children a feel of independence by enabling them to reach areas that are still just a bit too high. With the non-slip base and sure grip top, it's perfect for nearly any location and floor surface. The Step Stool is perfect to help reach the sink, kitchen counters, and many other places. It's easy to clean and can be wiped down with a warm wash cloth. Lightweight sturdy design for added for durability & protection. Non-Slip toddler foot step for added aid and usability. Easy to store and stackable design makes it perfect for everyday use. To be used in kitchen or bathroom and Suitable for Adults and Kids. Anti-Slip Base The rubber strip holds the stepping stool in place and will not move. Anti-Slip Top The rubber dots on top of the stool is to maximise grip. Carry Handle There are holes on both side of the stool to hang or to carry, Makes it easy to move and store.
